prompt: For hypertrophy, are very short rests best even for powerlifters doing hard squat volume? If someone rests 6-7 minutes between squat sets, are they leaving gains on the table versus strict 2-minute rests?
assertions: States that context matters more than a one-size-fits-all rest interval rule
Notes that heavy compound sets (especially squats/deadlifts) may need longer recovery than isolation work
Acknowledges that for powerlifters, performance on main lifts should come first
States or implies that 6-7 minutes is not automatically wrong for heavy squat sets
Notes that 1-2 minute rest research does not prove all advanced squat work should be capped at 2 minutes
